title: Sabatier 13pce Kitchen Knife Block Set - 5 Premium Knives, 6 Steak Knives, Scissors & Sharpening Steel, Beech Wood Block, Full Tang Chrome Molybdenum Vanadium Stainless Steel Blades, 25 Year Guarantee
features: ALL-IN-ONE KNIFE BLOCK SET FOR EVERY KITCHEN TASK – Whether you're a seasoned chef or a home cook, this complete knife block set has everything you need. With five essential kitchen knives, six steak knives, scissors, and a sharpening steel, you'll be prepared for any meal prep challenge. From delicate dicing to heavy-duty slicing, the right tool is always within reach. No more hunting through mismatched knives – keep everything organised and at your fingertips in the stylish beech wood block.

FIVE ESSENTIAL KITCHEN KNIVES FOR VERSATILITY & PRECISION – A 9cm Paring Knife for intricate peeling and trimming, a 12cm All-Purpose Knife for versatile everyday cutting tasks, a 20cm Chef’s Knife to handle everything from chopping vegetables to dicing herbs, a 20cm Carving Knife for perfectly slicing roasts, and a 20cm Bread Knife with a serrated edge to easily slice through crusty breads without squashing. The right knife for every need, reducing frustration and increasing efficiency.

SIX SERRATED STEAK KNIVES FOR PERFECT DINNER PRESENTATION – Impress your guests with six sharp, serrated steak knives, perfect for smoothly cutting through steaks, lamb, or even grilled chicken without tearing the meat. Each steak knife is designed to stay sharp for longer, ensuring clean, professional cuts during every meal. These knives aren’t just functional, they also look stunning when placed on your table setting.

BONUS TOOLS FOR A COMPLETE KITCHEN EXPERIENCE – Alongside the knives, this set includes serrated kitchen shears, ideal for snipping herbs, cutting meat, or even opening stubborn packaging with ease. The sharpening steel ensures that your knives stay in optimal condition, keeping blades razor-sharp and ready to perform. With these additional tools, you're fully equipped to tackle all kitchen challenges from prep to presentation.

DURABLE, ERGONOMIC DESIGN FOR COMFORT & SAFETY – Each knife in the set is forged from high-carbon Chrome Molybdenum Vanadium stainless steel, ensuring superior edge retention and resistance to corrosion. The full-tang blades, triple-riveted handles, and deep knife heels give you the strength, balance, and safety needed for precise cutting. The ergonomic design reduces hand fatigue, while the deep heels prevent your fingers from slipping onto the blade, making every cut safe and comfortable.
